93-1057665.name: Palestine Children's Relief Fund
93-1057665.mission: The Palestine Children's Relief Fund provides medical and humanitarian relief to children and families throughout the Middle East, primarily through medical sponsorships, hospital projects, and trauma care for children injured by conflict in Gaza and the West Bank.

27-3521132.name: World Central Kitchen
27-3521132.mission: World Central Kitchen uses the power of food to nourish communities and strengthen economies in times of crisis and beyond, deploying professional kitchens and local chefs to serve hot meals to disaster survivors and displaced populations around the world.

95-1831116.name: Direct Relief
95-1831116.mission: Direct Relief is a humanitarian aid organization that provides medical resources, supplies, and financial support to improve the health and lives of people affected by poverty or emergencies, working with local health workers in more than 90 countries.
